Title: The Pope's Exorcist
Writer: Michael Petroni, Evan Spiliotopoulos, R. Dean McCreary
Actors: Russell Crowe, Daniel Zovatto, Alexandra Essoe
Plot: In 1987, Gabriel Amorth, the Vatican's leading exorcist, investigates the demonic possession of an American boy in Spain, and discovers a secret the Vatican has tried to keep buried for centuries.
